entities.name: Selective Suppression vs Capability Loss

entities.context: Fonseca's RLHF replication study

entities.name: Process Supervision
entities.context: process supervision can cause capability loss if not careful... actually changes internals, not just outputs

entities.name: Outcome Supervision
entities.context: outcome supervision creates suppression... creates shallow constraints

entities.name: KL Divergence Penalty
entities.context: KL divergence penalty - higher → better preservation

entities.name: Catastrophic Forgetting
entities.context: Catastrophic forgetting literature - narrow datasets → more forgetting

entities.name: Introspection Accuracy

entities.name: Behavioral Self-Awareness
entities.context: Models have 'behavioral self-awareness' — privileged information about their own decision-making processes

entities.name: Concept Injection
entities.context: Experimental approach: Concept injection — inject known neural patterns into model activations and see if model detects them

entities.name: Linear Probes
entities.context: Linear probes on internal activations CAN reliably detect deception even when outputs look harmful
